_comment: Hyperparameter config for the BioRED baseline model. Vocabulary (entity_types, label_num) is NOT stored here — it lives in specs/label_spec.json and is loaded separately. This file contains only architecture dims, optimiser settings, and I/O paths.
_TODO: label_num and entity_types are intentionally absent. They are injected at training time from specs/label_spec.json by step04_finalize_config.py.
